nodes.label: WallBallAnalyser: Coordinates pose detection, ball detection, and target detecti
Analyse a wall ball shot video.      Pipeline per frame:       1. Pose detection
Scan the video every second looking for the 00:00 → 00:01 clock transition.
Use LLaVA to locate the target region, then run CV on that crop for         a pr
Post-processing pass: for each good rep in rep_log, check equipment         pres
Run full video analysis.          Returns:             Dict compatible with Work
Quick ball-only pass over the first ``max_frames`` frames.          Collects eve
Process one frame. Returns a small diagnostic dict for the analyse() summary.
After 3+ observed throw peaks, recalibrate target_y_px to the median         pea
Download/locate a video and run wall ball analysis.      Args:         video_url
Build a rough torso bounding box from pose landmarks to use as a     false-posit
